Package org.rodinp.core

Interface ISnapshotable

All Superinterfaces:
org.eclipse.core.runtime.IAdaptable, IRodinElement
All Known Subinterfaces:
IAction, IAssignmentElement, IAxiom, ICarrierSet, ICommentedElement, IConstant, IContextRoot, IContextRoot, IConvergenceElement, IData, IDependency, IDerivedPredicateElement, IEvent, IEventBRoot, IExpressionElement, IExtendsContext, IGuard, IIdentifierElement, IInternalElement, IInvariant, ILabeledElement, ILanguage, IMachineRoot, IMachineRoot, IParameter, IPOHint, IPOIdentifier, IPOPredicate, IPOPredicateSet, IPORoot, IPORoot, IPOSelectionHint, IPOSequent, IPOSource, IPredicateElement, IPRExprRef, IPRHypAction, IPRIdentifier, IPRPredRef, IPRProof, IPRProofRule, IPRReasoner, IPRRoot, IPRRuleAntecedent, IPRStoredExpr, IPRStoredPred, IPRStringInput, IPSRoot, IPSStatus, IReference, IRefinesEvent, IRefinesMachine, IRodinFile, ISCAction, ISCAssignmentElement, ISCAxiom, ISCCarrierSet, ISCConstant, ISCContextRoot, ISCContextRoot, ISCEvent, ISCExpressionElement, ISCExtendsContext, ISCGuard, ISCIdentifierElement, ISCInternalContext, ISCInvariant, ISCMachineRoot, ISCMachineRoot, ISCParameter, ISCPredicateElement, ISCProvableRoot, ISCRefinesEvent, ISCRefinesMachine, ISCSeesContext, ISCVariable, ISCVariant, ISCWitness, ISeesContext, ITestChildElement, ITestParentElement, ITraceableElement, IVariable, IVariant, IVersionEA, IVersionEB, IVersionEC, IVersionRootA, IVersionRootB, IVersionRootC, IVersionRootD, IVersionRootE, IVersionRootF, IVersionRootG, IVersionRootH, IWitness
All Known Implementing Classes:
Action, Axiom, CarrierSet, ComponentRoot, Constant, ContextRoot, ContextRoot, Data, Dependency, Event, EventBElement, EventBPOElement, EventBProofElement, EventBRoot, ExtendsContext, Guard, ImplicitHolder, InternalElement, Invariant, Language, MachineRoot, MachineRoot, NamedElement, NamedElement2, Parameter, POIdentifier, POPredicate, POPredicateSet, PORoot, PORoot, POSelectionHint, POSequent, POSource, PRExprRef, PRHypAction, PRIdentifier, PRPredRef, PRProof, PRProofRule, PRReasoner, PRRoot, PRRuleAntecedent, PRStoredExpr, PRStoredPred, PRStringInput, PSRoot, PSStatus, Reference, RefinesEvent, RefinesMachine, RodinFile, RodinTestDependency, RodinTestRoot, RodinTestRoot, RodinTestRoot2, SCAction, SCAssignmentElement, SCAxiom, SCCarrierSet, SCConstant, SCContextRoot, SCContextRoot, SCEvent, SCExpressionElement, SCExtendsContext, SCGuard, SCIdentifierElement, SCInternalContext, SCInvariant, SCMachineRoot, SCMachineRoot, SCParameter, SCPredicateElement, SCRefinesEvent, SCRefinesMachine, SCSeesContext, SCVariable, SCVariant, SCWitness, SeesContext, TestChildElement, TestParentElement, UbiquitousElement, Variable, Variant, VersionEA, VersionEB, VersionEC, VersionRootA, VersionRootB, VersionRootC, VersionRootD, VersionRootE, VersionRootF, VersionRootG, VersionRootH, Witness
public interface ISnapshotable extends IRodinElement
Common protocol for elements that have two versions: a snapshot and a mutable copy.

Such elements are Rodin files and internal elements themselves (which are descendants of a Rodin file).

For each Rodin file, the database provides two versions:

  • a stable snapshot that corresponds to the contents of the Rodin file on disk, and which is read-only.
  • a buffered copy of the Rodin file in memory which is read-write.
As a consequence, there are two kinds of handles for these elements, stable snapshot handles and mutable handles.

Since:
1.0

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ISnapshotable
    getMutableCopy()
    Returns a handle to this element in the mutable copy of its Rodin file.
    ISnapshotable
    getSnapshot()
    Returns a handle to this element in the snapshot of its Rodin file.
    boolean
    isSnapshot()
    Returns whether this is a handle in a file snapshot.

  • Method Details

    • getSnapshot

      ISnapshotable getSnapshot()
      Returns a handle to this element in the snapshot of its Rodin file.

      This is a handle-only method. The element may or may not be present.

      Returns:
      this element in the snapshot of its Rodin file

    • getMutableCopy

      ISnapshotable getMutableCopy()
      Returns a handle to this element in the mutable copy of its Rodin file.

      This is a handle-only method. The element may or may not be present.

      Returns:
      this element in the mutable copy of its Rodin file

    • isSnapshot

      boolean isSnapshot()
      Returns whether this is a handle in a file snapshot.

      This is a handle-only method. The element may or may not be present.

      Returns:
      true iff the corresponding element is or belongs to the stable snapshot of a Rodin file
